goal: Domain-agnostic multi-agent software evolution loop that can auto-discover evals and continuously improve any software project.
guards: Do not delete or overwrite existing tests
Do not modify files outside the declared scope
Do not introduce secrets or credentials into the repository
Do not modify test fixtures that other tests depend on
constraints: Prefer small, incremental changes over large rewrites
Each change should be accompanied by at least one test
Follow the existing code style and conventions
